description: (web + core) Non-admin users cannot create/edit/delete/activate Investigation LLM profiles (UI disabled/absent and API 403 or equivalent).

checks.evidence: canManage = usePermission(PERMISSION.MANAGE_SETTINGS); create/edit/delete/activate UI gated with {canManage && (...)}; handlers early-return if (!canManage); non-admin sees adminOnly copy
admin role includes MANAGE_SETTINGS; member role has VIEW_SETTINGS only (no MANAGE_SETTINGS)
POST/PATCH/DELETE/activate use { adminOnly: true }; GET has no adminOnly; withAuth returns 403 Admin access required. for non-admin
POST create, POST activate, PATCH, DELETE wrap requireRole('admin'); GET list open to authenticated tenant; requireRole throws ForbiddenError (statusCode 403)
BFF tests assert member POST/PATCH/DELETE/activate → 403 without Core call; UI source audit for canManage gates; Core route source asserts requireRole('admin') on mutate

notes: VERIFY-FIRST grep/static audit only (feature_list observation_method=grep). No server/browser started. Existing web UI + BFF + Core RBAC already satisfies AC-016.
